ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock information was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the stock is actively traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the stock price */,
  "price" REAL /* Value of the stock price */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the stock price data */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has been identified as an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the trading volume */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Value of the trading volume */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trading volume data */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the trading volume data */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data has been identified as an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of stocks in the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the sector information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the industry */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average price-to-earnings ratio of stocks in the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the industry information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_days_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of trading days per week */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the exchange information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "primary_exchange" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the exchange is the primary listing for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_hours" (
  "trading_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading hour */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "trading_date" TEXT /* Date of trading */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of trading */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of trading */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the trading date is a holiday */,
  "special_hours" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the trading hours are special */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_hours_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_calendars" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "is_observed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the holiday is observed */,
  "is_trading_day" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the holiday is a trading day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holiday_calendars_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
